supports: independent inspection of deposited session-level extraction outputs
inspection of pairwise replay comparison records
review of author-observed Backbone Overlap and VOID Coverage ranges
review of operational metric definitions used in the Chapter 6 case-study replay observation
does_not_support: bit-level reproduction of upstream LLM extraction
independent regeneration of W1-W8 from the source document
full executable reproduction of the replay pipeline
automated JSONL parsing across all deposited outputs

document.document_description: Reply Sentencing Memorandum Submitted on Behalf of Miles Guo
document.role_in_paper: Primary replay case study for Chapter 6 Section 6.8

language_note.schema_language: English field names and canonical runtime status flags
language_note.slot_content_language: Chinese natural-language slot content may appear in MCU payload fields
language_note.comparison_basis: Replay comparison is based on structural coordinates, MCU counts, canonical runtime flags, evidence references, Relay/VOID/Collision distributions, and author-observed structural-coordinate alignment, not on surface-language similarity.
language_note.boundary_note: The use of Chinese as the extraction working language does not imply translation-based semantic evaluation. It reflects the author's extraction workflow for producing MCU-compatible structural records under an English canonical schema.

deposited_output_format.description: The deposited output files preserve the original extraction-output format for each session. Some sessions may contain a human-readable T/P5 checklist or quota notes before JSON-compatible records; other sessions may encode comparable T/P5 information inside JSON records.
deposited_output_format.inspection_note: These files are provided for human inspection of the deposited extraction outputs. They are not intended to be parsed uniformly as strict JSONL streams.
deposited_output_format.counting_note: The reported MCU counts in this artifact are the author-recorded registered MCU counts used in Chapter 6 Section 6.8, not line counts of the deposited output files.

protocol.actual_extraction_prompt_disclosure: The exact author-defined extraction prompt is not included. This artifact supports independent inspection of deposited outputs and pairwise comparison records, not full upstream extraction reproduction.
protocol.multi_round_extraction_note: The manuscript reports a multi-round gap-checking procedure. Exact per-session review-round counts were not logged in this artifact; therefore the per-session field is marked as not_recorded.
protocol.boundary_note: Appendix C provides the MCU schema, adapter-facing structural terminology, and replay consistency criteria. It is not the executable prompt used to generate the W1-W8 outputs.

sessions.format_note: This deposited output file may include a human-readable T/P5 checklist, session-level notes, and JSON-compatible records. It is preserved for inspection and is not intended as a strict JSONL stream.

file_naming_note: The artifact package uses normalized deposited-output filenames. Original working filenames may differ from the normalized artifact filenames.
inspection_boundary_note: This package is an inspection artifact, not a full executable reproduction pipeline. It supports independent inspection of deposited outputs, session configuration, pairwise comparison records, and metric definitions. It does not claim bit-level reproduction of upstream LLM extraction or independent regeneration of W1-W8 from the source document.
